name: omni-search
desc: High-performance Windows file search + duplicate finder using NTFS USN/MFT, with Android LAN sync. Built with Tauri, Rust, C++, and Kotlin.
descFull: High-performance Windows file search + duplicate finder using NTFS USN/MFT, with Android LAN sync. Built with Tauri, Rust, C++, and Kotlin.
